backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing paste creation, retrieval, and user profile management with blob storage, access control, expiration handling, and password protection for authenticated users.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three high-confidence features related to investigating paste creation errors, adding comprehensive error logging, and ensuring proper frontend response handling.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend source files including routing, authentication, paste operations, error handling, utilities, and UI components with detailed logging enhancements.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes with custom design tokens for the application's visual system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport configuration and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component implementing hash-based routing with QueryClient provider, theme support, and route-based page rendering with extensive logging for debugging paste ID extraction and validation.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Shared layout wrapper providing header with navigation, conditional History link for authenticated users, login button, and footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/ErrorState.tsx: Reusable error display component supporting expired, not-found, and generic error states with optional retry functionality and detailed error messages.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component managing Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/PasteEditModal.t: Modal component for editing existing pastes, allowing users to modify text content, add new files, change password, and extend expiration. Handles file uploads with progress tracking and validation.
frontend/src/components/UploadProgressSt: Displays upload progress UI with a progress bar, showing current file number, total files, filename, and percentage completion.
frontend/src/config/pasteLimits.ts: Configuration file defining file size limits (50MB) for paste uploads in both MB and bytes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for backend operations including creating pastes, fetching paste data, editing pastes, extending expiration, and managing passwords with file upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors, shared card component styles, and base styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePastePage.tsx: Main page for creating new pastes with text and file uploads, password protection, expiration settings, file size validation, and share URL generation with copy functionality.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Displays authenticated user's paste history with cards showing paste details, expiration times, and edit/view actions. Includes loading states, error handling, and empty state prompts.
frontend/src/pages/PasteViewPage.tsx: Renders a single paste by ID with text/file content display, owner badges, download functionality, and comprehensive error handling for expired/not-found/generic errors.
frontend/src/utils/actorFactory.ts: Provides centralized actor creation functions for anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) backend connections, avoiding double-configuration warnings.
frontend/src/utils/backendError.ts: Normalizes backend errors into user-friendly messages, detecting auth-related errors and handling common patterns like file size, expiration, and network issues.
frontend/src/utils/draftEditorDiagnostic: Suppresses non-blocking draft-editor origin warnings from the Caffeine platform's preview system to reduce console noise without affecting app functionality.
frontend/src/utils/fileDownload.ts: Handles file downloads from ExternalBlob with proper filename inference from MIME types, extension handling, and cross-browser compatible download triggers.
frontend/src/utils/formatRemainingTime.t: Converts nanosecond bigint timestamps into human-readable time strings with minute granularity (e.g., '2 hrs 45 min', '3 days 5 hrs').
frontend/src/utils/pasteIds.ts: Validates, normalizes, and extracts paste IDs from routes, supporting both legacy numeric IDs and new GUID formats with URL decoding and sanitization.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and methods to clear parameters from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts, container settings, custom shadows, and accordion animations with typography and container query plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting a bug fix effort for a persistent error page appearing after paste creation in Version 14, with existing features and pending backend verification requirements.
